content: Self-Refine's single-model iterative self-feedback loop can be reframed as a monolithic, single-perspective precursor to modern multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, and we can create a hybrid framework that lets a single LLM pull inconsistent solving perspectives from its own earlier refinement iterations to bootstrap better reflection without additional models or training. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no extra training or supervised data, while addressing the key limitation of single-perspective reflection that multi-perspective mechanisms set out to solve.
